query: SELECT id, status, contentType, pillar, blotatoPostIds, scheduledAt, publishedAt, LEFT(content, 60) as preview, mediaUrl IS NOT NULL as hasBild, videoUrl IS NOT NULL as hasVideo, createdAt FROM content_posts ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
